stack: Automated testing tools, Agile, Quality assurance metrics
points_positifs: Poste orienté vers l'automatisation des tests et l'amélioration de l'efficacité
Niveau d'expérience 'Associate' (1-3 ans) correspondant parfaitement au profil
points_negatifs: Poste très focalisé sur le testing/QA plutôt que sur le développement de fonctionnalités pures
commentaire: Une excellente opportunité pour un profil junior qui maîtrise l'automatisation. Les compétences en scripting et en workflows d'Aodren sont directement transférables à la mise en place de frameworks de tests automatisés.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Test Engineer role at RateS. Your focus on maintaining testing frameworks and improving efficiency through new tools aligns with my background in automating technical workflows. I am very interested in how RateS ensures reliability for its retail platform.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days, but now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. These types of efficiency gains are exactly what I enjoy implementing.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React app with Supabase. It includes an automated daily scraper for 1,300+ listings. This project taught me how to handle complex data and ensure reliability across the entire system. I'm used to working with Agile methodologies and tracking performance metrics.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. I'm excited about the possibility of helping RateS level up its market position through high-quality software testing.

Aodren Gloux

stack: Java, Machine Learning, NLP, Search systems, Multimodal techniques
points_positifs: Poste Entry level correspondant aux 1.5 ans d'expérience d'Aodren
Forte composante IA/Automation qui match avec les projets personnels
Utilisation de Java, langage maîtrisé par le candidat
points_negatifs: Mention de la maîtrise du Mandarin comme un plus (collaboration avec la Chine)
Demande une expérience spécifique en systèmes de recommandation/search
commentaire: Une excellente opportunité chez un géant de la tech pour un profil junior. Le projet ValoFenua et l'automatisation n8n démontrent exactement la capacité à manipuler des données et des agents IA demandée ici.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Machine Learning Engineer position at Xiaomi. Your focus on optimizing recommendation quality through NLP and user profiling aligns perfectly with the automation systems I build. I have a solid background in Java and software architecture, which I understand is core to this role.

I recently built ValoFenua, a real estate platform for French Polynesia. The system uses a daily scraper to collect over 1,300 listings and feeds them into an AI agent that estimates prices based on live market data. I also developed an automated job search pipeline using n8n and AI agents to process large datasets. These projects allowed me to manage the exact type of data flows and ML integrations you are looking for at Mi.com.

At my current company, I redesigned the installation process. It used to take about 2 days for the team to complete. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone can run it. This was an 85% reduction in deployment time that significantly improved our team's efficiency.

I am currently finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I am very interested in how Xiaomi scales recommendation engines for millions of users and would love to discuss how my automation experience fits your team.

Aodren Gloux

cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Quality Automation Engineer role at VDL ETG Singapore. Your focus on integrating inspection tools and streamlining quality processes through automation matches my background in building efficient, data-driven systems.

At EXAIL Robotics, I redesigned the software installation process. It used to take about 2 days, but now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. This 85% reduction in deployment time shows how I approach automation to make complex workflows accessible and fast.

I also built an automated job search pipeline using n8n and Python scripts on a VPS. This system handles data capture and processing autonomously, much like the automated results and real-time dashboards you need for your metrology equipment. I am comfortable working with SQL databases and APIs to ensure data integrity across different platforms.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. Your mission to drive digital transformation in Quality Operations is the exact type of challenge I enjoy solving with code. 

Aodren Gloux
